description_long: This is a high-top sneaker with a predominantly white exterior, featuring a canvas-like upper material and a rubber sole. The shoe has a classic lace-up design with metal eyelets and a padded collar for added comfort and ankle support. The toe cap is reinforced with a textured rubber overlay, and the sole appears to be thick and durable, suitable for urban environments. Subtle stitching details are visible along the sides and around the collar, contributing to the shoe's structural integrity. The back of the shoe displays a small rectangular label on the heel, though the branding is not clearly legible. Overall, the shoe is clean and appears to be in new or like-new condition, with no visible signs of wear or dirt.
description: A white high-top sneaker with a canvas upper, rubber sole, and classic lace-up design. The shoe is clean, sturdy, and features subtle stitching and a padded collar.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the padded collar, heel tab, and a small rectangular label on the heel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the canvas upper, metal eyelets, and the full length of the rubber sole.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the reinforced rubber toe cap, laces, and symmetrical design.
description_view_3: Right front angle showing the lace-up closure, padded collar, and side stitching details.
